mapper.select:
SELECT b.id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, b.author AS author, b.cover_url AS bookCover, 0 AS score, '热门推荐' AS reason FROM book b WHERE b.id IN
#{id}

SELECT b.id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, b.author AS author, b.cover_url AS bookCover, ( COALESCE(b.hot_score, 0) * 0.5 + COALESCE(b.favorite_count, 0) * 0.2 + COALESCE(b.score_count, 0) * 0.2 + COALESCE(b.average_score, 0) * 0.1 ) AS score, '基础热门推荐' AS reason FROM book b ORDER BY COALESCE(b.hot_score, 0) DESC, COALESCE(b.favorite_count, 0) DESC, COALESCE(b.score_count, 0) DESC, COALESCE(b.average_score, 0) DESC, b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
